name: Faults
description: Customer is reporting a technical fault or problem with their Virgin Media service or equipment — including services not working, slow speeds, connection dropping, equipment malfunctioning, or signal issues. They are describing symptoms of a technical problem, not referencing specific error codes, checking outage status, or reporting restricted services.
